name: Apple Crunch
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the apples and dice them, then sprinkle with cinnamon and 1/3 cup of sugar.
2. Cream together butter and 2/3 cup sugar until smooth.
3. Beat in the egg, then add the flour, baking powder, and salt that have been sifted together.
4. Pour the mixture over the apples and bake at 425°F for 10 minutes, then reduce to 350°F and bake another 20 minutes.
5. The batter will be thick; gently drop and spread it as much as possible onto the apples.
